sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13078" key="a)poli/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπολῐ´ν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">operation by ligature,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
